sourcesContent:
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common'; import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms'; import { VerificationService } from '../verification.service'; @Component({ selector: 'app-pre-invest-dashboard', standalone: true, imports: [CommonModule, FormsModule], templateUrl: './pre-invest-dashboard.component.html', styleUrls: ['./pre-invest-dashboard.component.css'] }) export class PreInvestDashboardComponent implements OnInit { // Audit Check checkTitleNumber: string = ''; isAudited: boolean = false; auditError: string = ''; isSearchingAudit: boolean = false; // Simulator Data surface: number = 1000; landValuePerM2: number = 25000; // XAF titlingCostPerM2: number = 5000; // XAF repaymentModel: 'LAND_PORTION' | 'SALE_COMMISSION' = 'LAND_PORTION'; portionPercentage: number = 25; simulationResults: any = null; constructor(private verificationService: VerificationService) {} ngOnInit() { this.runSimulation(); } verifyAuditBeforeInvest() { if (!this.checkTitleNumber) return; this.isSearchingAudit = true; this.auditError = ''; this.verificationService.getPropertyStatus(this.checkTitleNumber).subscribe({ next: (property) => { this.isSearchingAudit = false; if (property.currentStatus === 'GREEN') { this.isAudited = true; this.runSimulation(); } else { this.auditError = 'Le terrain présente des risques (Statut non VERT). Financement impossible.'; } }, error: () => { this.isSearchingAudit = false; this.auditError = 'Aucun audit "VÉRIFIER" trouvé. Vous devez d\'abord auditer ce titre.'; } }); } runSimulation() { const totalCurrentValue = this.surface * this.landValuePerM2; const totalTitlingCost = this.surface * this.titlingCostPerM2; const valueMultiplier = 3; const totalTitledValue = totalCurrentValue * valueMultiplier; let maTerreShare = 0; let ownerShare = 0; if (this.repaymentModel === 'LAND_PORTION') { maTerreShare = (this.portionPercentage / 100) * totalTitledValue; ownerShare = totalTitledValue - maTerreShare; } else { maTerreShare = totalTitlingCost + (totalTitledValue * 0.15); ownerShare = totalTitledValue - maTerreShare; } this.simulationResults = { totalCurrentValue, totalTitlingCost, totalTitledValue, maTerreShare, ownerShare, netGain: ownerShare - totalCurrentValue }; } formatCurrency(amount: number): string { return new Intl.NumberFormat('fr-CM', { style: 'currency', currency: 'XAF' }).format(amount); } }
FINANCEMENT

Le Levier Financier

maTerre finance votre titre foncier. Vous ne payez rien jusqu'a l'obtention du titre.

Audit de Securite Requis

Pour proteger son investissement, maTerre ne finance que les terrains ayant recu un verdict VERT via le module VERIFIER.

{{ auditError }}

Vous n'avez pas encore audite votre terrain ?

ELIGIBLE AU FINANCEMENT Titre foncier audite : {{ checkTitleNumber }}
VERT

Simulateur de Financement

{{ surface }} m2
200 m2 5 000 m2
{{ portionPercentage }}%
10% 40%
VALEUR ACTUELLE {{ formatCurrency(simulationResults.totalCurrentValue) }} Estimation sans titre
VALEUR APRES TITRAGE {{ formatCurrency(simulationResults.totalTitledValue) }} Multiplication x3
INVESTISSEMENT maTerre {{ formatCurrency(simulationResults.maTerreShare) }} Frais + Commission
VOTRE GAIN NET {{ formatCurrency(simulationResults.netGain) }} Benefice apres remboursement

L'investissement est soumis a un audit prealable du terrain (Module VERIFIER).
